checks.name: Refund Policy
checks.description: EU requires clear refund/return policy for consumers
checks.finding: No refund or return policy detected. Required for EU sales.
checks.recommendation: Add a visible refund policy. Consider 14-day right of withdrawal for distance sales.

checks.name: Privacy Policy
checks.description: GDPR Article 13 requires privacy notice when collecting personal data
checks.finding: No privacy policy detected. Mandatory for any data collection.
checks.recommendation: Add privacy policy with: what data you collect, legal basis, retention, rights (access, erasure, portability).

checks.name: Cookie Consent
checks.description: ePrivacy Directive requires consent for non-essential cookies
checks.finding: No cookie policy or consent mechanism detected.
checks.recommendation: Add cookie banner with opt-in for non-essential cookies. Document in privacy policy.
